families.status_reason: Reviewed 2026-06-25 live Virginia Medicaid waiver pages. The official Waivers page states that Medicaid waivers are home and community based and explicitly points families to CCC+ and Developmental Disability waivers.

samples.evidence_snippet: The Medicaid waivers are home and community based offering supports and services to a Medicaid individual, both children and adults.

families.status_reason: Reviewed 2026-06-25 live DBHDS developmental services pages. families.status_reason: Reviewed 2026-06-25 live ITCVA pages. The ITCVA homepage identifies itself as the Commonwealth's early intervention system and says services are provided under Part C of IDEA; the Central Directory page routes referrals through local central points of entry and publicly lists county and city links; the Local System Managers directory publishes local managers with explicit county-and-city coverage crosswalks.
families.query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 live ITCVA statewide and local-routing pages for Virginia Part C evidence and local coverage.

samples.sample_name: Infant & Toddler Connection of Virginia homepage
samples.evidence_snippet: The Infant & Toddler Connection of Virginia is the Commonwealth's early intervention system for infants and toddlers with disabilities and their families.

samples.sample_name: ITCVA Part C lead agency statement
samples.evidence_snippet: DBHDS has proudly served as the Lead Agency for Virginia's implementation of Part C of the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act (IDEA) since 1987.
Referrals to the Infant & Toddler Connection of Virginia are made through and received by local central points of entry.
The Local System Managers directory publishes local managers and explicit 'Counties & Cities' coverage crosswalks such as Accomack County and Northampton County under Eastern Shore.

must_include: Welcome to the Infant & Toddler Connection of Virginia
Part C of the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act (IDEA)
Referrals to the Infant & Toddler Connection of Virginia are made through and received by

families.status_reason: Reviewed 2026-06-25 live Virginia DSS local department directory pages.
